title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: End-of-Life device shows green connection ring and red "i" icon on home screen; tapping "i" displays "Support for this device is no longer available" pop-up that dismisses on outside tap.
steps: 1. Ensure the device has passed its End Life Date.
2. Observe the home screen for the device.
3. Verify that a green ring (connection status) is displayed.
4. Verify that a red 'i' icon is displayed.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Verify the pop-up displays the text: 'Support for this device is no longer available.'
expected: When a device has passed its End Life Date, the home screen shows a green connection status ring and a red "i" icon. Tapping the "i" icon displays a pop-up with the message "Support for this device is no longer available." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
